sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42524" key="e)ri/s3" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρίς</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, perh. <sense id="n42524.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wool-worker, PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:2172" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2172</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(ii A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
